item.title: Why Your Anvil Rings So Much
item.description: A simple change that can make the whole shop feel calmer.

item.title: Banking the Fire in the Forge
item.description: A calm blacksmithing tip on keeping the fire alive by banking it, with a focus on steady heat and practical shop technique.

item.title: Forging a Spoon
item.description: A calm look at forging a spoon by hand, focusing on shaping metal with heat, hammer control, and traditional shop skill.

item.title: Small Shop Work That Lasts for Years
item.description: Small shop work, but the kind that gets used for years. A simple forged piece made for everyday use and lasting value.

item.title: Axe Forged From Steel Cable
item.description: A calm look at forging an axe from steel cable, highlighting shaping, heat, and traditional metalworking technique.

item.title: Forged Hook With Shelf for Everyday Carry
item.description: A handmade forged hook with a top shelf for keys, wallets, and more. A practical shop project focused on shaping, fit, and clean metalwork.
